description: Perform a Bayesian ANCOVA using the pre-loaded ExamAnxiety.csv dataset to test whether Gender predicts Exam performance while controlling for Anxiety. Use Exam as the dependent variable, Gender as the fixed factor, and Anxiety as the covariate. Include descriptive statistics and a descriptives plot with Gender on the horizontal axis. Save the analysis to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/BayesianANCOVA_ExamAnxiety.jasp.
